caption:
Healthy High Protein Blueberry Cheesecake 🍰😋🫐 

Ingredients: 
3 tbsp cottage cheese
2 oz cream cheese
1 large egg
2 tbsp sweetener (I used monkfruit)
2 tbsp blueberries
1 tsp vanilla extract

Instructions:
1. Blend all ingredients except the blueberries and pour it in a greased dish.
2. Add your blueberries & bake @ 325F for 30-35 mins. 
3. Take it out, chill for a couple hours & enjoy!

Pro tip: Mash some extra blueberries and swirl them in the top with a toothpick👌
author: Keto Snackz
transcript: If you bake blueberries with cottage cheese, an egg, cream cheese, and sweetener for 30 minutes, you get a healthy blueberry cheesecake.
title: High Protein Blueberry Cheesecake Recipe
one_liner: A simple 6-ingredient baked blueberry cheesecake made with cottage cheese for extra protein.
key_points: Blend cottage cheese, cream cheese, egg, sweetener, and vanilla, then bake at 325F for 30–35 mins
Add blueberries before baking and mash extras to swirl on top for flavor
Chill for a few hours after baking before serving
Uses monk fruit sweetener to keep it low-sugar and high-protein
